back: [MM] ဖိအား carried by soil skeleton. Controls ဖြတ်ခံနိုင်ရည်, ပေါင်းစည်းခြင်း, and အရည်ပြောင်းခြင်း. σ = စုစုပေါင်း ဖိအား, u = အပေါက်ရေ ဖိအား. Foundation of all geotechnical analysis (တာဇာဂီ 1925).
[MM] မော-ကူလုံ failure criterion. c' = effective ကပ်ငြိတွယ်ကပ်နိုင်ရည် (soil bonding). φ' = ပွတ်တိုက်ထောင့် (particle interlocking). Both depend on drainage conditions. CD/CU/UU tests in lab.
[MM] Time-dependent compression of saturated ရွှံ့မြေ as excess pore pressure dissipates. Tv = time factor. cv = coefficient of ပေါင်းစည်းခြင်း. H = drainage path. Longer drainage = more time.
[MM] Saturated loose သဲ loses strength when σ' → 0 during ငလျင်. FL < 1.0 = liquefiable. CSR = cyclic ဖိအား ratio from ငလျင်. CRR = cyclic resistance ratio from N-တန်ဖိုး or Vs.
[MM] Volume of voids / volume of solids. Loose သဲ: e ≈ 0.7-0.9. Dense သဲ: e ≈ 0.4-0.6. Related to porosity: n = e/(1+e). Decreases during ပေါင်းစည်းခြင်း.

[MM] State of compaction relative to loosest and densest states. Dr < 35% = loose. 35-65% = medium. 65-85% = dense. >85% = very dense. Correlated to စံထိုးဖောက်စမ်းသပ်ခြင်း N-တန်ဖိုး and ကုန်းထိုးဖောက်စမ်းသပ်ခြင်း qc.
[MM] Rate of water flow through soil per unit area per unit hydraulic gradient. ရွှံ့မြေ: k = 10⁻⁸-10⁻¹⁰ m/s. နုန်းမြေ: 10⁻⁶-10⁻⁸. သဲ: 10⁻³-10⁻⁵. ကျောက်စရစ်: >10⁻³.
[MM] တာဇာဂီ's general ဝန်ခံနိုင်ရည် equation. Nc, Nq, Nγ = dimensionless factors depending on φ'. q = surcharge = γDf. Allowable: qa = qu/FS (FS=3 typical).
[MM] Primary ပေါင်းစည်းခြင်း နစ်ကျခြင်း. Cc = compression index. H = layer thickness. e0 = initial အပေါက်အချိုး. σ'f = final ထိရောက်သော ဖိအား. σ'0 = initial. Use Cs for unloading/reloading.
[MM] Uniaxial compression of cohesive soil. Undrained ဖြတ်ခံနိုင်ရည် cu = qu/2. Used for soft ရွှံ့မြေ classification. qu < 25 kPa = very soft. 25-50 = soft. 50-100 = medium. >200 = hard.
[MM] Primary wave. Particle motion parallel to propagation. Travels in solids and liquids. Typical in soil: 200-2000 m/s. Saturated soil dominated by water: Vp ≈ 1500 m/s. Used in refraction surveys.

[MM] Secondary wave. Particle motion perpendicular to propagation. Cannot travel through liquids. Key for Vs30, site classification, and dynamic ကိန်းဆက်. G = ρVs² (small ပုံပျက်ခြင်း shear ကိန်းဆက်).
[MM] Time-average Vs in top 30m. Used for seismic site classification. Japan: 告示1457号. Class A: Vs30 > 600 m/s. Class B/C: 150-600. Class D (軟弱地盤): < 150 m/s.

[MM] Surface wave. Retrograde elliptical particle motion. Dispersive in layered media. Velocity depends on frequency (wavelength). Longer wavelengths sample deeper layers. Used in မျက်နှာပြင်လှိုင်း စူးစမ်းခြင်း surveys.
[MM] Dynamic (small-ပုံပျက်ခြင်း) moduli from seismic velocities. G = shear ကိန်းဆက်. E = Young's ကိန်းဆက်. ν = Poisson's ratio. For saturated soil: ν → 0.5 (undrained). Dry သဲ: ν ≈ 0.25-0.35.
[MM] Wave refraction at interface. At critical angle ic = arcsin(V₁/V₂), wave travels along interface as head wave. ic = arcsin(V₁/V₂). Used in ငလျင်အကွေ့ဆိုင်ရာ to find layer depths.
[MM] 63.5 kg hammer, 760 mm drop. N = blows per 300 mm. Energy correction to 60% (N60). Overburden correction: (N1)60 = CN·N60. JIS A 1219. Japanese ER ≈ 72% (auto hammer).
[MM] Continuous profile of qc, fs, u2 at 20 mm/s. Qt = normalized tip resistance. Fr = friction ratio (%). Ic = soil behavior type index. Ic < 2.05: သဲ. Ic > 2.95: ရွှံ့မြေ.

[MM] တွင်းဖော် seismic method measuring Vp and Vs at depth intervals. Surface source (hammer), downhole receiver. JGS 3511. Used for Vs30, dynamic moduli, seismic design. More accurate than surface မျက်နှာပြင်လှိုင်း စူးစမ်းခြင်း.

jp: [MM] プレッシャーメーター試験
back: [MM] In-situ lateral ဖိအား-ပုံပျက်ခြင်း measurement. Inflatable probe in တွင်းဖော်. Ep = ဖိအားတိုင်းကိရိယာ ကိန်းဆက်. PL = limit pressure (ultimate). Useful in soft ကျောက်, stiff ရွှံ့မြေs. Ménard ဖိအားတိုင်းကိရိယာ.
[MM] Measure bulk ခံနိုင်ရည် to map geology. 4-electrode arrays. Wenner (lateral), Schlumberger (depth sounding), dipole-dipole (2D imaging). Saltwater: 0.2 Ωm. ကျောက်: 1000+ Ωm.

[MM] Surface seismic method using first arrivals. Maps velocity layers. Requires V increasing with depth. Good for bedကျောက် depth, water table. Equipment: geophones + seismograph. 24-96 channel arrays.

[MM] Comprehensive geotechnical investigation of a site. Includes boring, sampling, in-situ tests (စံထိုးဖောက်စမ်းသပ်ခြင်း, ကုန်းထိုးဖောက်စမ်းသပ်ခြင်း, PS မှတ်တမ်းတင်ခြင်း), lab tests, and reporting. Required for all major construction in Japan.
[MM] Japanese method per 道路橋示方書 (Road Bridge Specification). Calculate CSR from ငလျင် acceleration. CRR from (N1)60cs. FL < 1.0 = liquefiable. Check at each soil layer. Typically < 20m depth.
[MM] Japanese seismic site classification per 告示1457号. 第1種地盤: ကျောက်/stiff (Vs30>600). 第2種地盤: ordinary. 第3種地盤: soft (Vs30<150). TG (site period) also used.
[MM] Standard penetration test result. N < 4: very soft/loose. N = 4-10: soft/loose. N = 10-30: medium. N = 30-50: dense. N > 50: very dense or ကျောက်. Key parameter for Japanese foundation design.
[MM] Long-term နစ်ကျခြင်း of soft ရွှံ့မြေ under load. May take years to decades. Important in Tokyo, Osaka bay areas with thick alluvial ရွှံ့မြေ. Monitoring with နစ်ကျခြင်း plates and piezometers.
[MM] Maximum load a foundation can support without shear failure. Ultimate: qu. Allowable: qa = qu/FS. FS = 3 (static). Japanese foundation design: 建築基礎構造設計指針.
[MM] Investigation using physical properties of ground. Seismic (弾性波), electrical (電気探査), electromagnetic (電磁探査), gravity (重力探査). Non-invasive subsurface mapping. License: 物理探査技士.

[MM] Uses elastic wave propagation (P-လှိုင်း, S-လှိုင်း) for subsurface imaging. Methods: refraction (屈折法), reflection (反射法), မျက်နှာပြင်လှိုင်း စူးစမ်းခြင်း (表面波), PS မှတ်တမ်းတင်ခြင်း (PS検層). Fundamental to 物理探査技士 exam.

[MM] Solid ကျောက် beneath soil overburden. ကျောက်တုံးအရည်အသွေးညွှန်း = ကျောက် Quality Designation. ကျောက်တုံးအရည်အသွေးညွှန်း > 90%: excellent. 75-90%: good. 50-75%: fair. 25-50%: poor. <25%: very poor. Key for tunnel design.
[MM] Ratio of preပေါင်းစည်းခြင်း ဖိအား to current ထိရောက်သော ဖိအား. OCR = 1: normally consolidated. OCR > 1: overconsolidated (stronger). Important for နစ်ကျခြင်း prediction and Ko estimation.
[MM] Ambient noise (microtremors) recorded with 3-component seismometer. H/V spectral ratio peak = site resonant frequency f0. Non-invasive. Used for rapid site screening. Nakamura method (1989).

jp: [MM] ロータリーボーリング
back: [MM] Standard ground investigation method in Japan. Rotary drilling with water flush. JIS A 1220. Recovers core samples for logging. Enables စံထိုးဖောက်စမ်းသပ်ခြင်း, sampling, PS မှတ်တမ်းတင်ခြင်း, ဖိအားတိုင်းကိရိယာ tests at depth.

[MM] Japanese national license for geological investigation. Categories: surface investigation, boring investigation, physical exploration. Required to supervise investigations for public works. Exam: written + practical.

[MM] Highest engineering qualification in Japan. Equivalent to international PE license. Geotechnical field: 応用理学部門 or 建設部門. Requires 7+ years experience + PE exam. Required for major design sign-off.

jp: [MM] モール・クーロン破壊基準
back: [MM] Defines the ဖိအား state at failure. Failure envelope is linear in τ-σ' space. Parameters c' and φ' from drained triaxial or direct shear tests. Most fundamental equation in မြေသားသိပ္ပံ.

[MM] Multichannel Analysis of Surface Waves. Measures Rayleigh wave dispersion curve from geophone array. Inverts to get Vs profile. No တွင်းဖော် needed. 24 channels, 4.5Hz geophones, 2-5m spacing typical.
[MM] Water pressure in soil voids. Hydrostatic (静水圧). Excess (過剰間隙水圧) from loading or ငလျင်s. Measured by piezometer (ピエゾメーター). Excess u = 0 at equilibrium (fully consolidated).

[MM] Measurement of physical properties in တွင်းဖော်s. PS မှတ်တမ်းတင်ခြင်း (弾性波検層), electrical logging, gamma-ray logging. Essential for stratigraphy correlation and geophysical parameter measurement at depth in Japan.

[MM] Waterproof optical probe lowered into တွင်းဖော် to observe wall conditions. Reveals: fracture orientation, aperture, joint infill, weathering grade, မြေအောက်ရေ inflow depth. 360° panoramic models available. Essential for tunnel and slope design in jointed ကျောက်. Used in conjunction with core logging.

[MM] Inclination of fractures observed in တွင်းတွင်းကင်မရာ footage. Measured from horizontal. Steep dip (>60°) toward tunnel face = high wedge failure risk. Camera orientation sensor allows 3D fracture orientation mapping. Critical input for kinematic stability analysis.

[MM] In-situ lateral ဖိအား-ပုံပျက်ခြင်း test using inflatable probe in တွင်းဖော်. Ménard ဖိအားတိုင်းကိရိယာ. Measures Em (ဖိအားတိုင်းကိရိယာ ကိန်းဆက်) and PL (limit pressure). Em used in foundation နစ်ကျခြင်း calculation. PL = lateral ground failure pressure. Best for soft ကျောက် and stiff ရွှံ့မြေ.

[MM] ဖိအားတိုင်းကိရိယာ limit pressure — the asymptotic pressure at which soil/ကျောက် fails laterally. Analogous to ဝန်ခံနိုင်ရည် in the lateral direction. PL correlates to undrained ဖြတ်ခံနိုင်ရည် (cu ≈ PL/5.5) and pile lateral capacity. Key design parameter from Ménard ဖိအားတိုင်းကိရိယာ test.

[MM] Electromagnetic pulse radar for shallow subsurface imaging. Speed v depends on dielectric constant εr: dry သဲ v≈0.15 m/ns, wet ရွှံ့မြေ v≈0.07 m/ns. Depth range: 0.5m (2GHz) to ~30m (25MHz). Best in dry resistive ground. Poor in ရွှံ့မြေ/saltwater. Used for utilities, voids, rebar, layer boundaries.

[MM] Controls electromagnetic wave speed in soil. Air εr=1. Dry သဲ εr=4-6. Moist သဲ εr=10-15. Saturated ရွှံ့မြေ εr=25-40. Water εr=81. High ရေပါဝင်နှုန်း = slow wave = poor မြေအောက် ရေဒါ depth. Calibrated in field using known target depth or CMP survey.

[MM] Direct measurement of ဝန်ခံနိုင်ရည် at foundation level. Steel plate (300mm or 750mm) loaded incrementally. K30 = subgrade reaction coefficient — key for Japanese road design (≥110 MN/m³ for road base). E0 = နစ်ကျခြင်း ကိန်းဆက် from elastic theory. Scale effect: real footing larger than plate.

[MM] Ratio of applied pressure to plate နစ်ကျခြင်း at s=1.25mm during ပြားတင်စမ်းသပ်ခြင်း (300mm plate). Used in Japanese road design to verify compaction. K30 = p(1.25mm) / 1.25mm × 1000. Also used for pile design and railroad track design in Japan (JIS A 1215). Values: soft ရွှံ့မြေ 10-30, သဲ 50-150, ကျောက်စရစ် >200 MN/m³.

[MM] Core-based measure of ကျောက် mass fracturing degree. Only natural breaks counted — mechanical drill breaks excluded. Classification: Excellent 90-100%, Good 75-90%, Fair 50-75%, Poor 25-50%, Very Poor <25%. Foundation of RMR and Q-system. Introduced by Deere (1963). Standard in Japanese tunnel and dam investigation.

[MM] Total core recovery from drilling. Different from ကျောက်တုံးအရည်အသွေးညွှန်း — TCR counts ALL recovered pieces including short ones. TCR=100% means perfect recovery, common in intact ကျောက်. TCR<ကျောက်တုံးအရည်အသွေးညွှန်း is impossible. Low TCR in soft/fractured zones indicates very poor ကျောက် quality or drilling problems. Both TCR and ကျောက်တုံးအရည်အသွေးညွှန်း are logged on တွင်းဖော် records.

[MM] Maximum investigation depth for surface methods. မျက်နှာပြင်လှိုင်း စူးစမ်းခြင်း: ~half the geophone array length. ငလျင်အကွေ့ဆိုင်ရာ: ~quarter of maximum geophone offset. မြေအောက် ရေဒါ: depends on antenna frequency and soil conductivity. Electrical ခံနိုင်ရည်: depth ~ electrode spacing (Wenner). PS မှတ်တမ်းတင်ခြင်း: unlimited with deep boring. Matching investigation depth to target depth is key survey design skill.

[MM] Classification of ကျောက် mass engineering quality. RMR (ကျောက် Mass Rating, Bieniawski 1989): 6 parameters scored 0-100. RMR>80: Class I (very good), 61-80: Class II (good), 41-60: Class III (fair), 21-40: Class IV (poor), <21: Class V (very poor). Used directly for tunnel support design and ကျောက် slope analysis in Japan.

eq: Strike = direction of horizontal line on plane
back: [MM] Geometric description of a discontinuity (joint, fault, bedding). Strike = compass direction of horizontal intersection. Dip = maximum angle below horizontal. Critical for assessing instability: planar failure if dip direction = slope direction. Used with တွင်းတွင်းကင်မရာ data and geological mapping. Japan: important for tunnel alignment selection.
